fishbone "Manual placement — Key vs Secondary"
effect "Q3 留存下滑 15%"

# 关键因素放上半，次要因素放下半
category product "产品 Product"  [side: top, order: 0]
category growth  "增长 Growth"   [side: top, order: 1]
category tech    "技术 Technical"[side: top, order: 2]
category ops     "运营 Ops"      [side: bottom, order: 0]
category brand   "品牌 Brand"    [side: bottom, order: 1]

product : "核心功能体验下降"
product : "新功能采纳率低"
product : "竞品差异化减弱"

growth : "付费获客 CAC 上升"
growth : "激活率下降"

tech : "移动端性能退化"
tech : "推送到达率下降"

ops : "客服响应变慢"
ops : "FAQ 覆盖不足"

brand : "社区活跃度下降"
brand : "品牌曝光份额下滑"
